What is Light Golden Blonde?
Light Golden Blonde is from the Ugly Duckling Gold Series.
Light Golden Blonde G will give a vivid light blonde color result with a golden reflect.
What will Light Golden Blonde G look like?
Light Golden Blonde G will give a warm, golden blonde hair color result at a light blonde hair color level, in other words level .
How will Light Golden Blonde G look like on my hair?
Ugly Duckling Light Golden Blonde G lifts by up to  levels, so if you hair color is level  (light brown), or lighter, you will be able to achieve this light golden blonde hair color result.
Who is Light Golden Blonde G Hair Color suitable for?
Light Golden Blonde is suitable for tanned skins and for anyone with a warm complexion.
What kind of Hair Coloring Technique can I use with Light Golden Blonde Hair Color?
Light Golden Blonde G works well either for partial coloring techniques or full head coloring techniques.
You can use Light Golden Blonde Hair Color for foil work, balayage, babylights etc.
